name: Mattie's Jam Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, sour milk, flour, butter, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and eggs until well combined.
2. Gently stir in the jam.
3. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. If desired, serve with caramel icing.
